description: Smart AI coding proxy — cuts Claude Code costs by 90% with multi-provider routing, compression, and file caching
post_install:
if (Test-Path "$dir\start.ps1") { Copy-Item "$dir\start.ps1" "$dir\aismush-start.ps1"; Set-Content "$dir\aismush-start.cmd" '@echo off
powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "%~dp0aismush-start.ps1" %*' }
